result.stdout:
flaui-qatouch-upload - Upload FlaUI test results to QA Touch

USAGE:
  flaui-qatouch-upload --results <path> --domain <domain> --token <token>
                       --project <key> --assign <user-key> [options]

REQUIRED:
  --results <path>        Path to NUnit3 XML or TRX results file
  --domain <domain>       QA Touch subdomain
  --token <token>         QA Touch API token
  --project <key>         QA Touch project key
  --assign <user-key>     User key to assign the test run

OPTIONS:
  --testsuite <key>       Fixed module key (skips auto-create)
  --milestone-name <name> Milestone name (default: "FlaUI Automation")
  --milestone-key <key>   Existing milestone key (skips creation)
  --tag <tag>             Tag applied to the test run (default: "flaui")
  --no-create-cases       Do not auto-create missing test cases
  --help, -h              Show this help message
